2605.23297.title: Ontological Knowledge Blocks: Executable Compliance and Profile-Based Validation for Trustworthy AI Systems
2605.23297.paper_summary: AI-enabled services deployed in critical digital infrastructure are subject to governance obligations spanning transparency, accountability, fairness, and traceability. Compliance today remains documentation-centric: obligations are described in prose, audits rely on static checklists, and verification depends on manual review. Such approaches do not scale to automated AI systems. This paper introduces Ontological Knowledge Blocks (OKBs), a programmable governance infrastructure that compiles regulatory obligations into machine-checkable constraints over structured evidence graphs. We formalize an OKB as a 5-tuple that binds normative obligations to an RDF/OWL concept schema, executable SHACL validation rules, explicit evidence requirements, and PROV-O provenance links. A deterministic regulatory compiler translates structured Intermediate Representation (IR) records into composable KB modules, enabling profile-based governance reconfiguration without modifying service code. We implement two prototypes and evaluate them in an AI-assisted HPC resource allocation scenario across 24 validation runs and four governance profiles. Results demonstrate profile-sensitive validation, strictly additive violation accumulation, SHACL validation latency between 12.6 ms and 100.3 ms, and profile equivalence testing confirming Combined as the strictly most comprehensive profile. All artefacts are released as open source.
2605.23297.paper_summary_zh: AI啟用的服務在關鍵數位基礎設施中部署，需遵守涵蓋透明度、問責制、公平性和可追溯性的治理義務。當前的合規性仍然以文檔為中心：義務以散文形式描述，審計依賴靜態檢查清單，而驗證則依賴手動審查。這種方法無法擴展到自動化的AI系統。本文介紹了本體知識區塊（OKB），這是一種可編程的治理基礎設施，將監管義務編譯成可機器檢查的約束，應用於結構化的證據圖。 我們將OKB形式化為一個五元組，將規範義務綁定到RDF/OWL概念架構、可執行的SHACL驗證規則、明確的證據要求和PROV-O來源鏈接。 確定性監管編譯器將結構化的中介表示（IR）記錄轉換為可組合的KB模塊，使得基於配置文件的治理重新配置無需修改服務代碼。我們實現了兩個原型，並在AI輔助的高性能計算資源分配場景中進行了評估，涵蓋了24次驗證運行和四個治理配置文件。結果顯示了對配置文件敏感的驗證、嚴格的違規累積、SHACL驗證延遲在12.6毫秒到100.3毫秒之間，以及配置文件等價性測試確認“Combined”是最全面的配置文件。所有產物均以開源形式發布。
2605.23297.author: Aasish Kumar Sharma et.al.
2605.23297.authors: Aasish Kumar Sharma, Julian M. Kunkel
